torch_pattern:
K_repeated = torch.cat([K[:, i : i + 1, :, :].repeat(1, nh // nkv, 1, 1) for i in range(nkv)], dim=1)
V_repeated = torch.cat([V[:, i : i + 1, :, :].repeat(1, nh // nkv, 1, 1) for i in range(nkv)], dim=1)
gt = torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention(Q, K_repeated, V_repeated, is_causal=True)
weight_transform: none; GQA head repetition (repeat/cat of K,V across nh // nkv groups) is absorbed into the kernel — pass unreplicated [B, nkv, S, D] K/V tensors directly

placement_observations.size_descriptor: Q: [B, nh, S, D]; K/V: [B, nkv, S, D]
placement_observations.source: test: from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=memory_config, pad_value=0.0); call_site: batched prefill sdpa_seq_len = seq_len // batch_size if batch_size > 1 else seq_len
